title: RoadmapRow
description: A single row in the docs/ROADMAP.md Wave Summary Table. Columns are Wave, Goal, Status, Target, and Ideas. The 'wave' column must match the wave-archive naming convention 'Wave N: Name'. 'Target' may be 'TBD' when no estimate is committed. 'Ideas' is an integer count (the number of spec-ready ideas in the wave). Completed waves are archived and removed from ROADMAP, so this schema only permits Planned or Active.

wave.description: Wave identifier in the exact form 'Wave N: Name', e.g. 'Wave 3: Wave Lifecycle Closure'.

status.description: ROADMAP-visible lifecycle status. 'Completed' waves are archived to docs/skill/arc/waves/ and removed from ROADMAP, so they MUST NOT appear here.

target.description: Target timeframe. Either a concrete value (e.g. '1-2 weeks', 'Q2 2026') or the literal 'TBD' when no estimate is committed.

ideas.description: Number of spec-ready ideas selected into this wave.
